justification: ACM's official 2018 Turing Award page explicitly names Bengio, Hinton, and LeCun as joint recipients for foundational deep learning work.
ACM's official 2018 Turing Award page explicitly names Bengio, LeCun, and Hinton as joint recipients for foundational deep learning work.
Senator Murphy's official press release names both Murphy and Schatz as co-introducers of the GUARDRAILS Act to repeal Trump's state AI law moratorium.
Senator Schatz's official press release names both Schatz and Britt as co-leads calling on AI companies to improve transparency and safety disclosures.
The official AIMA textbook site (Berkeley) explicitly names Russell and Norvig as co-authors of 'Artificial Intelligence: A Modern Approach', the book referenced in the evidence.
Phys.org article about the Stanford AI course explicitly names Peter Norvig and Sebastian Thrun as co-teachers of the 160,000-student online class.
Senator Coons's official press release names both Coons and Cotton as co-introducers of the resolution affirming U.S. AI dominance.
Senator Budd's official press release names both Budd and Kim as co-introducers of the Artificial Intelligence Ready Data Act.
Senator Husted's official press release names both Husted and Kim as co-leads of the bipartisan AI Talent Act.
Senator Kim's official press release names both Kim and Ricketts as co-introducers of the MATCH Act to tighten export controls on semiconductor manufacturing equipment.
Senator Risch's official press release names both Risch and Luján as co-introducers of the TEST AI Act of 2025.
Senator Blackburn's press release explicitly names Risch and Blackburn (along with Luján and Durbin) as co-leads of the Senate National Labs Caucus.
Senator Durbin's press release explicitly names Risch, Blackburn, Luján, and Durbin as co-leads of the Senate National Labs Caucus, documenting the Risch–Durbin collaboration.
Washington Post analysis documents Musk spending $288 million to support Trump's 2024 election campaign, directly evidencing the financial/political collaboration between Musk and Trump.
Senator Schatz's official press release names both Schatz and Kennedy as co-introducers of the AI Labeling Act (S. 2691).
